3044140.name: Unsteady
3044140.description:
Shrink down to size and balance your way through over 50 unique physics puzzles in Unsteady! This unique VR puzzle game challenges your problem-solving skills as you deconstruct your way through increasingly complex and precarious block towers.

Grab onto climbing rocks to navigate the towers and pull out as many blocks that you can, but don't let it collapse! As you progress, the puzzles become more intricate and challenging, requiring a steady hand and sharp mind. One wrong move, and it's all over!

Test your understanding of physics across 7 different worlds, each with their own set of challenges. You'll need to jump, climb, shoot, and even swim your way through various obstacles to achieve a 3-star rating on each puzzle.

Get ready for a new perspective on a classic game!
